en: it an ih like pin but it's eh pen Now what about this letter It can be pronounced with an N like
ko: 발음하기도 해. pin처럼. 하지만 eh, pen이야. 이 글자는 어때? N으로 발음할 수도 있어, pen-guin처럼. 하지만

en: pen guin but it can also be pronounced as an NG peng ng peng guin pen
